{{Infobox location
| name = World of Night
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The World of Night is a specialized technique utilized by [[Akura Malice]]. This domain is composed of shadows, dreams, and nightmares, often appearing as a vast expanse of darkness or a realm of silhouettes. It serves as [[Malice]]'s primary method for interacting with [[Fate]], allowing her to summon shadows of the future and observe potential upcoming events. Within this space, she can manifest various shapes, such as smoky statues of animals like [[dragons]] or tigers. The technique can activate involuntarily, plunging the user into a pitch-black environment that may cause spiritual distress due to the pervasive sense of terror. While it provides a way to glimpse destiny, the visions within can shift from small flickers to massive, looming obstacles.}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] slips into the [[World of Night]] to summon shadows of the future.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[World of Night]] technique allows the user to see shadows and dreams as vague shapes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] possesses the [[World of Night]] technique.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[World of Night]] is a place where [[Malice]] experiences visions through a technique.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] can consult the future by finding herself in the [[World of Night]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[World of Night]] contains dark statues.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
